title: Jacob Lovick The Famous Ashtray
description: Miles Betterthanieu is one of the world's leading True Crime Podcasters (TM). You'll know him as presenter of '15th In Line: An Investigation into why Prince Edward is actually the Queen’s Worst Child' (Natter Platter Nominee 2022*), 'Windsor vs Castle: Who Is The Best Barbara?' and 'Murder of the True Crime Podcaster'. But for his new series 'The Famous Ashtray', an investigation into the object at the dark heart of every musical controversy of the 20th/21st Centuries, has Miles finally met his match? In a terrifying live show that ties together everything from witch cults to BuzzBalls, from getting punched in the face to 80s EuroPop, this is True Crime Podcasting (TM) you'll want to like and subscribe to. 'The Famous Ashtray' is a psychedelic character comedy from the unruly mind of Jacob Lovick (4 million views on TikTok/Instagram). *'Most Episodes in One Series' award Praise for Jacob's previous work: "Why wouldn't you go?" ★★★★ - A Youngish Perspective ★★★★ - Broadway Baby
